name: Priya Sharma
empathy_review_notes: === EMPATHETIC COMMITTEE ADVOCACY NARRATIVE === Our 50-agent committee evaluated this builder and noted the following human signals: - Resume Warmth Agent: Bio shows a genuine human voice and professional pride. - Writing Clarity Agent: Candidate structures thoughts clearly and articulates achievements well. - Technical Vocabulary Agent: Uses accurate engineering terminology corresponding to claimed skill sets. - Authenticity Scout: Contact info is verified and communication channel is authentic. - Layout Compassion Agent: Evaluates content over aesthetic packaging; ignores format differences. - Commit Cadence Agent: Demonstrates active coding habit with 847 commits. Ombudsman Verdict: Prioritize their demonstrated builder drive over traditional pedigree.
